description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: test and deploy. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.10, checks out the code, installs dependencies, runs tests with coverage, and uploads results to Codecov. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the test job, and is triggered on push events to tags. It checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, installs build and twine, builds and publishes the package to PyPI, and creates a release.
